BundleInfo.name: ChimeraX-DAQplugin
BundleInfo.Author: Genki Terashi
BundleInfo.Synopsis: DAQ Score computation and visualization for cryo-EM models
BundleInfo.Description: DAQ-Score: Deep-learning-based residue-wise Quality Assessment for cryo-EM models.

Classifiers.ChimeraXClassifier: ChimeraX :: Command :: daqcolor apply :: General :: Color residues from a numpy DAQ score file
ChimeraX :: Command :: daqcolor monitor :: General :: Start/stop live recoloring
ChimeraX :: Command :: daqcolor points :: General :: Show DAQ score points as markers
ChimeraX :: Command :: daqcolor clear :: General :: Close marker models
ChimeraX :: Command :: daqscore compute_grid :: Volume Data :: Compute DAQ scores from a cryo-EM map using contour threshold
ChimeraX :: Command :: daqscore compute_pdb :: Volume Data :: Compute DAQ scores at heavy atom positions from a PDB structure
ChimeraX :: Command :: daq arrowwin :: General :: Show DAQ-improving move arrows (window-aware) using aa_score
ChimeraX :: Command :: daq clearrestraints :: General :: Clear Position Restrains generated by DAQplugin
ChimeraX :: Tool :: DAQplugin :: Validation :: DAQ score computation and residue-wise visualization
